message:
🔗 fix(leaderboard): link social column to GitHub profiles for all contributors (#1490)

The Social column only showed a click count for contributors with
affiliate data, and returned null for everyone else. Now every
contributor gets a clickable GitHub icon (linking to their profile),
and contributors with affiliate clicks get the pink badge as before
— but as a link to their GitHub profile instead of a static span.

Also adds an affiliate program CTA section below the point values,
explaining the UTM format so anyone with a GitHub account can
participate — not just intern01-style handles.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
